title: クレーンゲーム大成功！

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
You were amazing! I cannot put my gratitude into
words!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I will now accept this plushie and accompany it
with all the sincerity I can muster!
choice_data_list: You don't need to go that far...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
That just won't do! I will have it by my side at
bedtime, when I eat, and in my training sessions! I
vow to cherish it, for the two of us will never be
apart!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I will treasure this plushie because you're the one
who gave it to me!
